overview.short: Kalyangad Fort/Nandgiri is a historical fort located in the Koregaon Taluka (administrative unit) of Satara district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Kalyangad Fort/Nandgiri is a historical fort located in the Koregaon Taluka (administrative unit) of Satara district of Maharashtra, India. The fort stands at the end of a spur of the Mahadev mountain range running south-west from the villages of Vikhale and Bhadle, eight miles north of Koregaon and about fourteen miles north-east of Satara. Its elevation is 3,537 feet or 1,067 to 1,078 meters above sea level.

topPlaces.name: Dare (Satara)
topPlaces.description: Dare is a village in the Jawali taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Hivare
topPlaces.description: Hivare is a village in Koregaon taluka of Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is located approximately 24 km from Koregaon and 29 km from Satara.

topPlaces.name: Banawadi
topPlaces.description: Banawadi is a census village of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated near to the Satara Phaltan state highway, about 21 km north of Satara, about 108 km from Pune and 220 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Koregaon
topPlaces.description: Koregaon is a census town and headquarters for the surrounding Koregaon Taluka in the Satara subdivision of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated on the NH-548C Satara-Baitul National Highway about 18 km east of Satara city, about 120 km from Pune and 267 km from Mumbai.

items.note: Dare is a village in the Jawali taluka of Satara district in Maharashtra, India.
Hivare is a village in Koregaon taluka of Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is located approximately 24 km from Koregaon and 29 km from Satara.

Banawadi is a census village of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated near to the Satara Phaltan state highway, about 21 km north of Satara, about 108 km from Pune and 220 km from Mumbai.

Koregaon is a census town and headquarters for the surrounding Koregaon Taluka in the Satara subdivision of Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is situated on the NH-548C Satara-Baitul National Highway about 18 km east of Satara city, about 120 km from Pune and 267 km from Mumbai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalyangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalyangad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalyangad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalyangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalyangad?
faq.a: Stays in Kalyangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalyangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dare (Satara), Hivare, Banawadi, Koregaon.
